subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! The sweet fragrance that hath wafted from the rose-garden of those loving friends' hearts doth perfume the senses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء بوی خوشی که از گلشن دلهای ان یاران مهربان منتشر گشته مشام
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual transformation
